Why AgriEdge

Built Different.
Works Better.

⚡

Vibration-Assisted Blade

High-frequency vibration slices through roots with minimal effort — faster than any manual tool.

🧍

Full Standing Operation

Long handle means every part of weeding is done fully upright — no bending at any stage.

🎯

Root-Level Precision

Serrated blade cuts weeds at the root, reducing regrowth while protecting your crops.

🛡

Field-Grade Durability

Heavy-duty materials built to endure daily use across all Indian soil types, season after season.

🔧

Modular Add-ons

Weed bag holder and safety med kit attach in seconds — customize your AgriEdge as needed.

⚖

Ergonomic Balance

Weight and grip placement optimized for all-day comfort — designed from real farmer feedback.

Product Specifications

The Tool
in Detail

📏
HandleAdjustable long-reach pole
🔩
MechanismHigh-frequency vibration motor

BladeSerrated precision cutting blade
✋
GripErgonomic T-bar cross handle

Add-onsModular attachment compatible
Simple to Use

How It Works

01

Grip & Stand

Hold the handle and stand fully upright. No bending at any point.

02

Activate Vibration

Switch on the motor and feel the blade power up.

03

Cut at Root Level

Guide the blade to the weed base — slices cleanly through roots in seconds.

04

Collect & Continue

Weeds fall clear. Use the bag holder add-on to collect them automatically.

Optional Accessories

Customize Your Edge

🌿

Weed Bag Holder

+₹150 · Pole-Mounted

Clips onto the pole. Weeds go directly into the bag as you cut — keeps your field clean effortlessly.

🩺

Safety Med Kit

+₹150 · Field First Aid

Compact first-aid kit attaches to the pole — always prepared for minor cuts while working in the field.
